Session timeout/inactivity timeout applied to clients will be delayed. Clients will remain longer than the configured timer. PIM with MSDP Currently, PIM is not supported in ISSU on RP routers, therefore traffic loss is expected during ISSU on RP routers where PIM and MSDP are enabled.
